title: The Mystery of the Missing Honey
synopsis: Nia helps her animal friends solve the mystery of who took Buzzy the bee's honey from the old baobab tree in the African savanna.

pages.text: Nia walked through the golden grass of the savanna. The warm sun painted everything orange and yellow. She loved visiting her animal friends here. Today, she heard crying near the big baobab tree.

illustration.description: A girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes walking through tall golden savanna grass toward a massive baobab tree, painted with thick gouache brushstrokes in warm orange and yellow tones
illustration.alt: Nia walking through golden savanna grass toward a large baobab tree

pages.text: Buzzy the bee was buzzing sadly around the tree. 'Oh, Nia!' he cried. 'Someone took all my honey! I worked so hard to make it. Now it's all gone!' Tears dripped from his tiny eyes.

illustration.description: A small expressive bee crying near a baobab tree while a girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes looks concerned, painted with textured painterly gouache strokes in warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Buzzy the bee crying to Nia about his missing honey

pages.text: 'Don't worry, Buzzy,' said Nia kindly. 'I'll help you find out who took your honey. Let's look for clues!' Nia was good at solving mysteries. She looked carefully at the ground.

illustration.description: A girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes kneeling down to examine the ground near the baobab tree while a small bee hovers nearby, painted with bold confident gouache brushstrokes in golden grass colors
illustration.alt: Nia examining the ground for clues while Buzzy watches

pages.text: Nia found sticky paw prints leading away from the tree. 'Look, Buzzy! These prints are covered in honey. Let's follow them!' The prints went toward the watering hole.

illustration.description: A girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes pointing at honey-covered paw prints on the ground while a bee flies beside her, painted with thick gouache brushstrokes showing golden savanna grass and an orange sunset
illustration.alt: Nia pointing at sticky paw prints leading away from the tree

pages.text: At the watering hole, they met Kesi the elephant. 'Did you see anyone with honey?' asked Nia. Kesi shook her big head. 'No, but I heard strange noises in the acacia grove this morning.'

illustration.description: A large expressive elephant at a watering hole talking to a girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes and a small bee, painted with textured painterly gouache in warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Kesi the elephant talking to Nia and Buzzy at the watering hole

pages.text: The paw prints led right to the acacia grove! Nia and Buzzy followed them carefully. The sticky prints were getting fresher. 'We're getting close!' whispered Nia excitedly.

illustration.description: A girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes and a bee following paw prints toward acacia trees, painted with bold confident gouache strokes in golden grass and orange sunset colors
illustration.alt: Nia and Buzzy following the trail toward acacia trees

pages.text: Behind a big acacia tree, they found Jengo the monkey. His paws were sticky with honey! His face was covered in golden honey too. He looked very guilty and sad.

illustration.description: An expressive monkey with honey-covered paws and face sitting behind an acacia tree looking guilty, while a girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes and a bee discover him, painted with thick gouache brushstrokes in warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Jengo the monkey caught with honey on his paws and face

pages.text: 'Jengo!' said Buzzy angrily. 'You took my honey!' But Nia noticed something. Jengo was crying. 'Why did you take it, Jengo?' she asked gently. 'There must be a good reason.'

illustration.description: A crying monkey with sticky paws while a girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes speaks gently to him and an upset bee hovers nearby, painted with textured painterly gouache strokes
illustration.alt: Nia speaking gently to the crying monkey while Buzzy looks upset

pages.text: 'My little sister Asha is very sick,' Jengo sniffled. 'Mama said honey might help her feel better. I'm sorry I took it without asking. I didn't know what else to do!'

illustration.description: A sad monkey explaining his situation to a girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes and a bee, with golden grass and orange sunset painted in bold confident gouache strokes in the background
illustration.alt: Jengo explaining why he took the honey to help his sick sister

pages.text: Nia's warm kind eyes filled with understanding. 'Oh, Jengo! You should have asked for help.' She turned to Buzzy. 'What do you think we should do?' Buzzy thought for a moment.

illustration.description: A girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes looking understanding while a thoughtful bee flies nearby and a sad monkey watches, painted with thick gouache brushstrokes in warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Nia looking understanding while Buzzy thinks about what to do

pages.text: 'I'm still sad you took my honey,' Buzzy said. 'But I understand now. Let's all go help little Asha together!' Jengo's face lit up with hope. 'Really? You'll help?'

illustration.description: A happy bee, hopeful monkey, and a girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes standing together, painted with textured painterly gouache in golden grass and orange sunset colors
illustration.alt: Buzzy agreeing to help while Jengo looks hopeful and Nia smiles

pages.text: They all went to see Asha. Buzzy shared his remaining honey to help her feel better. Jengo promised to always ask before taking things. 'Friends help each other,' said Nia happily.

illustration.description: A group scene with a girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes, two monkeys, and a bee sharing honey together under acacia trees, painted with bold confident gouache strokes in warm savanna colors
illustration.alt: Everyone together helping little Asha with the honey while Nia smiles

pages.text: From that day on, whenever any animal needed help, they knew they could ask Nia, Buzzy, or Jengo. The mystery was solved, and they had learned that helping each other made everyone happy.

illustration.description: A sunset scene showing a girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes walking with various savanna animals including a bee, monkeys, and an elephant in golden grass, painted with thick gouache brushstrokes in orange sunset colors
illustration.alt: Nia walking with all her animal friends in the golden savanna at sunset

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: What was missing from the baobab tree?
questions.explanation: Buzzy the bee was crying because someone had taken all his honey from the baobab tree.

questions.question: What clues did Nia find?
questions.explanation: Nia found sticky paw prints covered in honey that led away from the tree.

questions.question: Who took the honey?
questions.explanation: Jengo the monkey took the honey, and they found him with sticky paws and honey on his face.

questions.question: Why did Jengo take the honey?
questions.explanation: Jengo took the honey because his little sister Asha was sick and he thought it might help her feel better.

questions.question: How did the story end?
questions.explanation: Buzzy shared his remaining honey to help Asha, and they all became friends who help each other.
